Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Masons]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 2''' — The Masons provide reports.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 2''' — Masons are a group employed in Fletcher's workshop.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 4''' — Masons are mentioned as forces that could be lost.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 4''' — Masons provide information in the area.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 5''' — The Masons have a headquarters that is a gray building.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 6''' — Masons are trained as professionals in actual fields and relay information to the Consultant's Guild.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 7''' — The Masons are a group of Consultants that host two hundred and thirty-seven students.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 7''' — The Masons were posing as guards.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 10''' — Masons wear long Blackwatch coats.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 15''' — Yala is considered a legend among the Masons.}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 3''' — The Masons specialize in undercover infiltration.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 8''' — Masons lay foundations.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 19''' — Masons were preparing for war.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 22''' — The Masons are a Guild led by Yala.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 5''' — Masons are a group that Shera signals and works with during operations.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 5''' — Masons can hide among ordinary unconscious citizens.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 5''' — Masons can fake sleep.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 5''' — Masons are spies, not assassins.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 6''' — Shera's Masons are secretly part of Bareius' recruits.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 8''' — Shera's Masons are ordinary-looking civilians.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 14''' — The Masons are positioned in the Imperial Palace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 14''' — Masons were positioned to spread discontent with news-sheets.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 27''' — The House of Masons has wood-and-plaster walls.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
